productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Blue Adi Cliff Flip Flop
description: adidas created this pair of Adi Cliff flip flops for those who want fashion doubled with comfort. The print on the foot-bed is in a stylish contrast colour. Pair them with a tee and your favourite slept-in style denims for a casual outing.UpperThick fabric striped thong strapsFabric toe separator for maximum comfort with branding on the axis of the slipperRubber foot-bed with print for all-day massage feelOutsoleTPU outsole with geometric textured lugs for maximum tractionFlip flop careWipe off dirt with a moist clothDo not machine wash
